perItemFindings.label: T-4
perItemFindings.one_line: D: T-4 load-bearing/drift-watch in md lines 215-227 does not explicitly place ass:consistency-noanticip (.tex lines 364-367) in either list, even though the necessity clause uses consistency; dropped sampling assumptions also lack concrete .tex line numbers (.tex lines 403-418).

verbatim_critique: Patch only the drift-watch/load-bearing bookkeeping. For T-1, T-2, and T-3, keep the current judgments but replace the vague §4 references with exact .tex line citations: ass:consistency-noanticip lines 364-367, ass:completion lines 390-401, ass:sampling-lp lines 403-410, ass:frontier-contact lines 412-418, preserving each one-line reason. For T-4, add ass:consistency-noanticip (.tex lines 364-367) to the load-bearing hypotheses, noting that the consistency component is used in L-7 / .tex lines 715-760 to identify the on-arm mean and derive β; if no-anticipation is not used in the array-level extract, mention that in the same bookkeeping note or drift-watch explanation. Also add exact line citations for dropped ass:sampling-lp and ass:frontier-contact in T-4. No P/L/T mathematical content needs re-formalization.
